required_header.download_date: ClinicalTrials.gov processed this data on January 2026
required_header.link_text: Link to the current ClinicalTrials.gov record.

clinical_study.brief_title: Adjuvant Chemotherapy in Node-Positive Hormone Receptor-Positive, HER2-Negative Breast Cancer with High Recurrence Risk

brief_summary.textblock: This study evaluates the efficacy of adjuvant taxane-based chemotherapy followed by endocrine therapy in postmenopausal women with hormone receptor-positive, HER2-negative invasive breast cancer with node-positive disease and a high genomic recurrence score. Patients who have undergone breast-conserving surgery are eligible if staging is Stage II and genomic testing indicates high risk of recurrence.

detailed_description.textblock: Eligible patients will have completed lumpectomy with negative surgical margins and sentinel lymph node biopsy or axillary dissection demonstrating limited nodal involvement (1-3 positive nodes). Patients must have ER-positive, PR-positive, HER2-negative invasive ductal carcinoma with an Oncotype DX Recurrence Score of 26 or higher. Patients will receive docetaxel and cyclophosphamide (TC) for 4 cycles followed by whole breast radiation and adjuvant endocrine therapy with an aromatase inhibitor. The primary endpoint is invasive disease-free survival at 5 years.

clinical_study.study_design: Intervention Model: Single Group Assignment, Primary Purpose: Treatment

criteria.textblock:
Inclusion Criteria:
- Histologically confirmed invasive ductal carcinoma of the breast
- Estrogen receptor (ER) positive and progesterone receptor (PR) positive (both greater than or equal to 10% nuclear staining by IHC)
- HER2-negative (IHC 0 or 1+, or FISH non-amplified)
- Oncotype DX Recurrence Score greater than or equal to 26 (high risk)
- 1 to 3 positive axillary lymph nodes (pN1a)
- Pathologic stage T2N1aM0 (Stage IIA or IIB)
- Prior breast-conserving surgery (lumpectomy) with negative surgical margins
- Postmenopausal female, age 40 to 70 years
- ECOG performance status 0 or 1
- Adequate organ function: ANC greater than or equal to 1.5, platelets greater than or equal to 100, creatinine less than or equal to 1.5x ULN, AST/ALT less than or equal to 2x ULN
Exclusion Criteria:
- HER2-positive disease (IHC 3+ or FISH amplified)
- Triple-negative breast cancer (ER-negative, PR-negative, HER2-negative)
- Metastatic (Stage IV) disease
- More than 3 positive axillary lymph nodes
- Prior systemic chemotherapy for current breast cancer diagnosis
- Active autoimmune disease requiring systemic treatment
- Prior malignancy within the last 5 years (except adequately treated non-melanoma skin cancer or cervical carcinoma in situ)
- Uncontrolled cardiac disease or active congestive heart failure
- Pregnancy or breastfeeding
